content: Microsoft eShopOnWeb and Clean Architecture template define 4-layer structure: Application Core (Domain entities, interfaces, services), Infrastructure (EF Core DbContext, repositories, external adapters), UI Layer (Controllers, Views, ViewModels). Dependencies flow inward via Dependency Inversion. Domain has zero external dependencies. Host.MVC is composition root wiring DI. Repository pattern with Unit of Work for data access abstraction. Confirmed by ardalis/cleanarchitecture template.
